gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; furthermore, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, as a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; furthermore, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
